apps.name: Flashback Remote
apps.subtitle: Wireless control for the ONE35 V2
apps.localizedDescription:
Remove the 27-photo roll limit on your Flashback ONE35 V2 and wirelessly transfer DNG files — all from one app, no USB needed.

• Set any roll length up to 100 frames
• One-tap camera WiFi connection
• Transfer DNGs and JPEGs wirelessly
• Embedded RAW editor (Flashback PWA)
• No cloud account required

versions.localizedDescription:
New look and quality-of-life updates.

• Liquid-glass styling across the app with the Flashback orange accent
• Light / Dark / System appearance setting
• Active tab highlighted in the floating tab bar
• Files load automatically once you join the camera's WiFi
• Roll length remembered between sessions

Icon + Library polish.

• App icon now matches the Flashback editor (a stale build step had been overwriting it on every build)
• Continuous, smooth filmstrip in the photo viewer
• Fixed tapping a photo sometimes only opening halfway
• What's New now shows a summary per version

Library viewer fixes.

• Multi-photo Share now works
• Swipe left/right between photos in the viewer
• Smoother filmstrip (only the open photo expands) and pinch-zoom
• File name no longer hidden behind the filmstrip
• New What's New page in Settings → About

Photos-style Library.

• Tap a photo for a full-screen viewer; swipe left/right between photos
• Scrollable filmstrip at the bottom to jump around
• Long-press to select; Share / count / Delete in a glass action bar; Select All / Deselect All
• Removed the Select button; large title to match the other tabs

Library decoding fixed.

• ONE35 DNGs now render correctly with a native Bayer decoder (ported from the Flashback editor) — no more colour banding
• Thumbnails are cached so the Library reopens instantly
• Editor: effects/export buttons no longer hidden behind the tab bar
• Fixed remaining content hidden under the floating tab bar

Library and Editor fixes.

• Library thumbnails decode correctly now (including raw DNGs) and the grid layout is fixed
• Select photos (long-press) to Share or Delete in bulk; Select All / Deselect All
• Editor is full-screen again — no top bar, and its controls clear the tab bar
• Download concurrency defaults to 1 (the camera caps total speed, so parallel doesn't help)
• Settings: the GitHub link is no longer hidden behind the tab bar

UI refresh, a Library, and faster transfers.

• New Library tab — preview your DNGs/JPEGs on-device and keep or delete them
• Floating glass-style tab bar; Settings is now its own tab
• Parallel downloads are tunable (1–6) with a live MB/s + elapsed readout
• Done screen shows saved/failed with a Retry option
• Pull-to-refresh in the Editor tab
• New app icon and button polish

First production release of Flashback Remote.

• Remove the 27-photo roll limit (set any length up to 100)
• One-tap camera WiFi and wireless DNG/JPEG transfer
• USB import via the Files app
• DNGs-only and always-delete options
• Compatibility self-test for new firmware
• Embedded Flashback RAW editor
